Home / Services / Fence Staining

Fence Staining

Protect and beautify your fence with our professional staining services.

A well-maintained fence enhances your property's curb appeal and provides privacy and security. Our fence staining services protect your fence from the elements, extending its life and enhancing its natural beauty. We carefully prepare your fence by cleaning, sanding, and repairing any damaged boards. We use high-quality stains that are specifically formulated for outdoor use, providing superior water resistance, UV protection, and mildew resistance.

We offer a variety of stain colors and finishes to match your style and preferences. We can also help you choose the right type of stain for your fence's wood type. We apply the stain evenly and carefully, ensuring a consistent and long-lasting finish. We also offer fence sealing services to further protect your fence from the elements. We are experienced in staining fences of all sizes and styles, from picket fences to privacy fences. We take pride in our workmanship and our commitment to customer satisfaction.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Thorough Cleaning and Sanding
  2. 02 Step 2: Repairing Damaged Boards
  3. 03 Step 3: Application of High-Quality Stain
  4. 04 Step 4: Sealing for Added Protection

Benefits

  • Protect your fence from the elements
  • Extend the life of your fence
  • Enhance the natural beauty of your wood
  • Prevent warping, cracking, and fading

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I stain my fence?

In Colorado Springs, most fences need to be stained every 2-3 years, depending on the type of stain used and the severity of the weather exposure. Regular cleaning can help extend the life of your stain job.

What type of stain is best for my fence?

The best type of stain for your fence depends on the type of wood used and your desired look. We can help you choose the right stain for your fence, considering factors like water resistance, UV protection, and color retention.

Do I need to clean my fence before you stain it?

Yes, it is essential to clean your fence thoroughly before staining it. We will power wash your fence to remove dirt, mildew, and old stain.
